graph order
85
adjacency matrix

label vector
7 69 4 80 73 63 70 67 59 2 10 13 6 41 28 26 32 36 42 64 21 68 43 84 53 50 39 74 52 37 8 76 29 82 22 72 81 46 17 11 19 60 40 77 47 51 25 71 66 12 27 55 61 38 1 65 14 56 18 30 75 24 16 35 45 15 44 31 3 79 33 57 48 34 9 78 62 49 5 58 23 83 20 54 85
